allies.rationale_text: Scientific-method-evidence-testing helps first-principles-thinking pressure-test the rebuilt premises against reality instead of treating them as elegant abstractions.
allies.source_quote: By pushing clients to formalize reasoning and prove causal links with evidence, FPT can overturn preconceived ideas.

allies.rationale_text: Simplification helps first-principles-thinking turn stripped-down truths into usable building blocks instead of leaving them as abstract philosophy.
allies.source_quote: FPT aims for "Simplicity" (finding the essential core), serving as the starting point for effective communication.

antagonists.rationale_text: Anchoring undermines first-principles-thinking by locking attention onto the first frame or premise before alternative cuts are tested.
Confirmation-bias makes first-principles-thinking defend the chosen premises instead of challenging them with contradictory evidence.

structured_tensions.tension_text: First-principles-thinking conflicts with simplification when ground-up re-derivation produces a complex accurate model that is less actionable than the simpler heuristic it replaced.
structured_tensions.source_quote: first-principles-thinking conflicts with simplification (simplification) when ground-up re-derivation produces a complex accurate model that is less actionable than the simpler heuristic it replaced.

structured_tensions.tension_text: First-principles-thinking conflicts with authority-bias when inherited expert doctrine is accepted without re-derivation from foundational facts.
structured_tensions.source_quote: first-principles-thinking conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when inherited expert doctrine is accepted without re-derivation from foundational facts.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on ally and antagonist logic rather than on an explicit tension block, so the file preserves that smaller first-order surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor-style relation inflation where the raw source itself is more conceptual than explicitly relational.
open_questions: Latticework and scaffolding remain source-real allies, but scientific-method-evidence-testing and simplification were the cleaner bounded anchors into the current graph.
